microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a **2-person operation** into a platformized system, standardizing deployment workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and shifted execution to a scalable, repeatable deployment model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable pattern for continuous client-facing validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead and primary stakeholder liaison for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract.

Synthesized recurring client feedback into a prioritized roadmap of platform improvements, distilling deployment pain points into strategic themes that shaped Tailor's internal tooling and reduced onboarding friction across enterprise accounts.
Scaled team leverage through **AI-driven automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%.
microsoft_2023: Championed **product adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting client-facing demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, translating business pain points into prioritized, actionable requirements for intent-based YAML generation features.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, cutting lookup time by 83% and streamlining internal delivery handoffs.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning 140+ teams and multiple stakeholder groups.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce deployment toil, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw delivery data into a prioritized, client-ready roadmap input.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning IT, Operations, and Engineering on a structured deployment plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, managing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and establish a repeatable requirement intake process for the engineering team.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing handoff friction across teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end client scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, standardizing a CRM-based intake process that improved delivery speed and client communication.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve client onboarding funnel performance.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and formalizing a repeatable financial template to streamline future client scoping.
